source_description: Cross-repo Spec Kitty stability and hygiene hardening across merge/worktree safety, intake security, runtime state progression, cross-repo package contracts, sync recovery, and e2e coverage. Driven by start-here.md in the workspace root; covers issue lists across spec-kitty, spec-kitty-events, spec-kitty-tracker, spec-kitty-runtime, spec-kitty-tracker, and spec-kitty-end-to-end-testing repos.
